name_en: [Premium Hardware, Original Leather] Nappa Lambskin Mini Handbag/Shoulder Bag~Heather
name_cn:
[Premium Hardware, Original Leather] Nappa Lambskin Mini Handbag/Shoulder Bag~Heather
This mini handbag is known for the soft texture of Nappa lambskin. An adjustable shoulder strap adds practical details, while a embossed letter logo showcases classic style
~Letter logo
~Adjustable shoulder strap
~Lined
Size: W14×H17×D6cm
No.: 5NF460
